claims.headline: Sharpens memory
claims.notesSentence: Chronic supplementation improved memory consolidation in healthy adults in a 12-week double-blind trial.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Bacopa memory consolidation trial on PubMed

claims.headline: Calms an anxious mind
claims.notesSentence: Improved cognitive performance, anxiety, and depression scores in a placebo-controlled trial in older adults.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Bacopa anxiety and cognition trial on PubMed
